title: Word Ladder
description:
Given `beginWord`, `endWord`, and a `wordList`, return the number of words in
the shortest transformation sequence from `beginWord` to `endWord`, changing one
letter at a time, where every intermediate word is in `wordList`. Return `0` if
there is no such sequence. The sequence length counts both endpoints.
constraints: All words are lowercase and the same length.

solutions.summary: Each word is a node; edges connect words differing by one letter. BFS gives the shortest path.

steps.title: BFS, generating neighbors by letter swaps
steps.explanation: From each word, try every position × every letter; enqueue valid, unvisited words and count levels until `endWord`.
